title: spendable_notes account guard is Rust-only; SQL has no account predicate
description: Trigger: schema evolution adds account_index to notes table for multi-account wallets. The 'if account \!= 0 { bail\!() }' guard creates false confidence that accounts are isolated. The SQL query (db.rs spendable_notes) has no WHERE account_index = ? predicate. When multi-account support lands, account=0 queries will return notes from all accounts. Fix: add account_index to notes schema now and filter in SQL, or add a TODO comment documenting that account isolation is not enforced at the query level.
close_reason: Added account isolation comment to spendable_notes SQL documenting missing account_index predicate
